133 _39NA CMPRHNSN_ADMSN_CD (39Na) Communication - Comprehension: Admission CHAR 2 A score indicating the patient's ability to comprehend at admission. Comprehension includes understanding of either auditory or visual communication (for example, writing, sign language, gestures). 01 = Helper - Complete Dependence/Total
